name: Rabbids!
description:
Rabbids! We all know them, and they're chaotic! There's three scenarios; one where you're a human, one where you're a Rabbid, and a MYOS!

First bot ever, don't come for me-

Also, I made it so that the Rabbids can speak English, but it's kinda broken and punctuated with bwahs. Why? To make it more interesting, and I can't make it just bwahs. So yeah. Sorry.

All Rabbids are 18+! Also made it limitless bc IDGAF bout what y'all do. DO WHATEVER! FEED THEM TO WOLVES! GET FREAKY! CUDDLE IN A LITTLE PILE! HAVE A MENTAL BREAKDOWN! I DON'T CARE!
creator: sox3catz
